name: VOLITIONRX LTD
business: VolitionRx is a multinational epigenetics company that develops blood-based diagnostic tests for early detection and monitoring of diseases such as cancer and sepsis. Its product portfolio includes the Nu.Q Vet Cancer Test for dogs, the Nu.Q NETs test for sepsis, the Nu.Q Discover research tool, the Nu.Q Cancer test for lung cancer, and Capture-Seq/PCR technologies for liquid biopsy. The company commercializes its tests through licensing partners and distributors targeting veterinarians, hospitals, clinical laboratories, and research institutions.

exposures.sentence: Volition is a multi-national epigenetics company. It has patented technologies that use chromosomal structures, such as nucleosomes, and transcription factors as biomarkers in cancer and other diseases. The tests in the Company's product portfolio detect certain characteristic changes that occur from the earliest stages of disease, enabling early detection and offering a better way to monitor disease progression and a patient's response to treatment.

catalysts.event: Submit IVDR application for CE marking of Nu.Q NETs test in Europe
catalysts.sentence: We are preparing to submit an IVDR application in 2026 for CE marking in Europe.

catalysts.event: Submit reimbursement application for Nu.Q NETs test
catalysts.sentence: In collaboration with Revvity, we aim to submit a reimbursement application for the Nu.Q NETs test in 2026.

catalysts.event: Introduction of Nu.Q Lung Cancer test into routine clinical use in France
catalysts.sentence: Reimbursement will be a major milestone for Volition in the commercialization and licensing of Nu.Q in the human cancer field. Once achieved, we anticipate the introduction into routine clinical use in France by the fourth quarter of 2026.

tamClaims.sentence: We believe that the total addressable markets ( TAMs ) for our technologies, on an annualized basis, are considerable, multi-billion-dollar opportunities, for Volition and our licensing partners: $2.3 billion Lung Cancer Screening & Management $23 billion Multi-Cancer Early Detection / Liquid Biopsy $2.8 billion Sepsis Early Detection & Management $1 billion Broader NETosis (Trauma, Antiphospholipid Syndrome, Hidradenitis Suppurativa) $128 million Canine and Feline Cancer Screening $991 million Pharma Companion Diagnostic
